title: 2026 Oscar Best Supporting Actor Predictions
text: The 98th Academy Awards will air March 15, 2026, hosted by Conan O'Brien. Gold Derby has compiled predictions for the Best Supporting Actor category based on combined forecasts from industry experts, website editors, and top-performing users. Sean Penn leads with 58.09% odds for his role in One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.). Penn brings substantial Oscar pedigree, having won twice previously for Best Actor in Mystic River (2003) and Milk (2008), plus three additional nominations in that category. Stellan Skarsgård holds second place at 30.35% odds for Sentimental Value (Neon). This marks his first Oscar nomination despite a lengthy career in cinema. Delroy Lindo captures third position with 7.75% odds for his performance in Sinners (Warner Bros.), also earning his inaugural nomination. Jacob Elordi follows at 2.61% odds for Netflix's Frankenstein, making his first Oscar bid as well. Benicio Del Toro rounds out the top five at 1.20% odds for One Battle After Another. Del Toro previously won in this category for Traffic (2000) and received another nomination for 21 Grams (2003). The predictions reflect strong momentum toward Penn's veteran status and established track record in major awards competitions.
